microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end technical delivery** of Azure's recovery validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ in measurable customer impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 deployment of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that cut operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a full production rollout in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects that reshaped platform roadmap priorities.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as technical bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring coordinated multi-team sequencing.
Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured end-to-end workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **production adoption of AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 Azure service teams through hands-on demos and onboarding sessions, translating model capabilities into tangible engineering value and saving 37 engineering hours monthly.

Surfaced critical feature gaps through **11+ structured discovery sessions** with customer engineering teams, directly influencing the product roadmap to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a first-class capability.

Accelerated LLM-powered retrieval by migrating documentation to a **semantic search system** with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving model grounding accuracy for downstream workflows.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M in pull-forward revenue** through faster production deployment.

Led discovery with 20+ service teams to map 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then scoped and delivered a **full-stack automation roadmap** targeting the highest-toil production paths across the deployment lifecycle.
Built a **Power BI production dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and sequence high-impact investments with field-grounded data.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero production downtime** during a 2,000+ unit OS migration by owning the end-to-end deployment strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and sequencing rollout to protect live operations.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, cutting the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable delivery model for future fleet rollouts.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog sequencing, resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep cross-functional teams unblocked through a fast-moving pilot.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning end-to-end scoping, sequencing, and delivery of 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM workflow that removed manual blockers and standardized the customer handoff process.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing web presence and search profile to improve top-of-funnel adoption.
Identified and closed margin leaks by analyzing **1,000+ project records**, delivering a profitability model that gave leadership the field feedback needed to reprice and protect delivery quality.
